app.name: LegalViz.EU
app.home: Téigh go dtí an leathanach baile

seo.defaultDescription: Interactive visualisation of EU laws. Navigate articles, recitals, and annexes with ease.
seo.defaultKeywords: EU law, GDPR, AI Act, DMA, DSA, Data Act, visualisation, legal tech, interactive law
seo.landingDescription: Read and navigate EU laws efficiently with interactive visualisations. View articles and related recitals side by side.

error.routingError: LegalViz hit a routing error while opening this page.
error.unexpectedProblem: LegalViz ran into an unexpected problem while loading this page.

search.searchingCached: Searching {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}. Open a law in this language to make it searchable.
search.noCached: No last opened laws are searchable in {language} yet. Open a law in this language to add it to search.
search.typeCached: Type to search across {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}.
search.noResultsCached: No results found for "{query}" in {count} last opened {lawWord} in {language}.
search.apiUnavailable: Tá cuardach dlíthe gan fáil go sealadach.
search.noResultsLaws: Níor aimsíodh aon ghníomhartha príomha AE do "{query}".
search.placeholderLaws: Cuardaigh gníomhartha príomha an AE de réir teidil, tagartha nó CELEX
search.placeholderMatches: Cuardaigh dlíthe a osclaíodh le déanaí...
search.searchingLaws: Ag cuardach gníomhartha príomha AE ó innéacs LegalViz ó 2010.
search.searchingMatches: Ag cuardach i {count} {lawWord} a osclaíodh le déanaí i {language}.
search.typeCurrentLaw: Clóscríobh chun cuardach a dhéanamh i {law}.
search.typeLaws: Cuardaigh gníomhartha príomha an AE de réir teidil, tagartha nó CELEX.

topBar.byline: By Konrad Kollnig, Law & Tech Lab Maastricht

landing.heroTitle: Léigh dlí an AE go galánta,
landing.heroDescription: Cuir dlí le do leabharlann nó oscail arís ceann atá in úsáid agat cheana féin. Ansin taispeánann LegalViz caibidlí, ailt, aithrisí agus iarscríbhinní taobh le taobh.
landing.option2: Option 2 · Open a law from your library
landing.importHelper: Choose the act type, year, and number. If automatic import fails, LegalViz opens the corresponding EUR-Lex search page.
landing.example: Sampla don GDPR: roghnaigh Rialachán, cuir isteach 2016 mar bhliain agus 679 mar uimhir.
landing.invalidReference: Cuir isteach bliain 4 dhigit agus uimhir uimhriúil dlí.
landing.automaticImportFallback: Theip ar an gcuardach uathoibríoch, mar sin osclaíodh EUR-Lex i gcluaisín nua.
landing.importUnavailable: Níorbh fhéidir an dlí seo a oscailt faoi láthair.
landing.visualiseStepsTitle: Visualise other EU laws in 4 simple steps
landing.extensionDescription: Want to visualise a different EU law? Install our browser extension to open any recent EU law from EUR-Lex in this visualiser.
landing.step1: Install the extension for your browser (see links above).
landing.step2: Visit a EU law page on EUR-Lex.
landing.step3: Open the law in the English language using the language selector on EUR-Lex.
landing.step4: Click the extension icon to open that law in LegalViz directly.
landing.sourceCode: Cód foinse agus tacaíocht ar GitHub
landing.builtBy: Tógtha ag Konrad Kollnig sa Law & Tech Lab, Ollscoil Maastricht.
landing.addLawCta: Cuir dlí eile le do leabharlann
landing.addLawDescription: Oscail dlí trína thagairt oifigiúil nó cuir leis go díreach ó EUR-Lex é.
landing.libraryDescription: Oscail dlí atá curtha agat leis cheana féin agus lean ort ag léamh ón áit ar stop tú.
landing.libraryEmpty: Níl aon dlíthe i do leabharlann fós. Cuir ceann leis chun tosú.
landing.addLawDialogDescription: Roghnaigh conas is mian leat an dlí a chur leis. Is féidir leat a thagairt oifigiúil a iontráil nó leathanach EUR-Lex a úsáid.
landing.openFromEurlex: Cuir dlíthe go díreach ó EUR-Lex le do leabharlann
landing.pasteEurlexUrlHelper: Greamaigh URL leathanach dlí ar EUR-Lex.
landing.importResolveFailed: Níorbh fhéidir an leathanach EUR-Lex seo a mheaitseáil le dlí is féidir le LegalViz a oscailt.
landing.addByReferenceTitle: Cuir leis de réir tagartha dlí
landing.extensionInline: Nó suiteáil ár síneadh chun aon dlí a oscailt go díreach ó EUR-Lex trí chliceáil ar dheilbhín an tsínidh, gan URLanna a chóipeáil:
landing.recentDescription: Fill ar na dlíthe a d'oscail tú le déanaí.
landing.recentEmpty: Níl aon dlíthe oscailte le déanaí fós. Cuardaigh ceann chun tosú.
landing.recentShowAll: Taispeáin gach {count} dlí a osclaíodh le déanaí
landing.searchHint: Cuardaigh gníomhartha príomha an AE de réir teidil, tagartha nó CELEX agus oscail iad go díreach.
landing.searchPlaceholder: Cuardaigh gníomhartha príomha an AE de réir teidil, tagartha nó CELEX

resetFooter.title: Nach bhfuil rud éigin ag obair?
resetFooter.button: Cliceáil anseo chun an aip a athshocrú
resetFooter.note: This clears LegalViz local settings and cached data in this browser.

printModal.title: Roghanna priontála
printModal.description: Customize what you want to include in your print-ready view or PDF.
printModal.includeRelatedRecitalsHelp: Automatically inserts relevant recitals next to articles based on AI analysis. Useful for understanding context.

relatedRecitals.title: Related Recitals
relatedRecitals.description: These recitals appear to be related to this article based on text analysis using simple AI (TF-IDF similarity (Nanda et al.)). Sorted by relevance score.

lawViewer.notAvailableTitle: This law is not available here yet
lawViewer.notAvailableMessage: We couldn't find the structured text version we use to display this law in LegalViz. The law itself may still be available on EUR-Lex.
lawViewer.lawLoadServiceFailed: The law could not be loaded from the Formex service.
lawViewer.referenceResolveFailed: This law reference could not be resolved automatically.
lawViewer.importResolveFailed: This EUR-Lex page could not be resolved to an importable CELEX document.
lawViewer.legacyExtensionMessage: LegalViz now imports laws through a new Formex-based flow. This older extension entrypoint is no longer supported, so please update your browser extension and try again.
lawViewer.selectPrompt: Select an article, recital, or annex from the menu to begin reading.
lawViewer.structuredVersionUnavailable: The structured LegalViz version of this law is not available right now.
lawViewer.lawContentUnavailable: The law content is unavailable right now.
lawViewer.quickNavigationHelp: Jump directly to a specific article, recital, or annex number.
lawViewer.articleNavigationHint: Is féidir leat na heochracha saighead clé agus deas a úsáid freisin.
lawViewer.legacyHtmlFallbackMessage: Tá an dlí seo á thaispeáint ó sheanfhormáid HTML EUR-Lex. D'athraigh LegalViz an teanga ar ais go Béarla ar mhaithe le hiontaofacht.
lawViewer.sideBySideDesktopOnly: Tá léamh taobh le taobh ar fáil ar scáileáin níos mó.

metadata.caseLawNoResults: Níl aon chásanna ag teacht le do chuardach.
metadata.caseLawSearchPlaceholder: Cuardaigh de réir páirtí, uimhir cháis nó airteagal…

metadata.title: Stádas agus dátaí
